reviews.review_title: Voice Restriction Not Lifting After Ban
reviews.review_description:
The game itself is fun but the voice chat system is broken

I got a 3hour voice ban waited way longer than that, and I’m still muted Every time I join it flashes green like I can talk, then instantly switches back to voice restrict

I’ve tried everything reinstalling, restarting, waiting and nothing works

If bans don’t actually expire properly, that’s a big problem This needs to be fixed

Love the game, hate the kids who dont know how to hoop and completely dont know how the game of basketball works, always double dribbling, carrying, and traveling but i know you just get slown down but still. Please add violations and raise the half court scores to first to 21 and 2s and 3s.

This game is really good but the moderation SUCKS. i got voice chat banned for nothing and looked at the duration for the ban and it was blank, I waited and I waited I was voice chat banned for about month. When I got my voice chat back I played a few games didn't say anything bad then got voice chat banned again FOR NOTHING, I had to wait another week. One time this kid called me a black monkey so I reported him BUT THEN I GOT VOICE CHAT BANNED, LIKE WHATTT!. Pls fix your moderation.

I loved this game because you get to play against other people in sports. And we all know sports can get competitive so often cussing will occur, but if I even say shut up I get voiced banned for 133 hours. It’s actually so dumb because it’s a sport game and you don’t allow cursing? Why make the game in the first place if it was gonna be Sensitive about cursing.

"Big Baller VR is hands down the best game I have played! The immersive virtual reality experience combined with the fast-paced gameplay keeps me coming back for more. The graphics are stunning and the controls are smooth and intuitive. If you"🎮 Big Baller VR is hands down the best I've ever played The graphics are stunning, the gameplay is're a fan of virtual reality games, this is a must immersive, and the challenges are endless. I can't get enough of-play.

I’ve tried all the VR sports games, and Big Ballers ’26 definitely has the best feel. The physics engine makes dunks and jump shots feel natural, and it's actually challenging to master. I love the variety—being able to switch from basketball to baseball or football in one game is a huge plus. The monthly updates keep it fresh. Definitely a must-play if you want a competitive sports sim!

Big Ballers VR Basketball is an immersive virtual reality game that puts you right on the court. As a player, you can choose from a variety of customizable avatars and compete in fast-paced, arcade-style matches. The game’s physics give you a realistic sense of shooting, dribbling, and dunking. You can play solo to practice your skills or jump into multiplayer modes to face off against other players online. The controls are designed to feel natural, using motion tracking to mimic real basketball movements. Different courts and environments keep the gameplay fresh and exciting. Power-ups and special abilities add a fun, competitive twist to matches. The game also encourages teamwork when playing in cooperative modes. Its bright visuals and energetic soundtrack make every game feel lively. Overall, Big Ballers VR Basketball offers a fun and engaging way to experience basketball in virtual reality.
